description: Create attrs.rs with RlmTypeAttrs (container-level: repr, iter, index, pyclass_name, properties), RlmFieldAttrs (field-level: desc, filter_property, filter_value, filter_field, flatten_property, flatten_parent, skip_python, skip_schema), and RlmPropertyAttrs (computed properties metadata). Use darling FromDeriveInput and FromField.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 1.2): add attribute parsing via darling in `crates/rlm-derive/src/attrs.rs`.
Key structs:
- `RlmTypeAttrs` (`#[rlm(...)]` on struct): repr template, iter/index fields, pyclass_name, properties.
- `RlmFieldAttrs` (`#[rlm(...)]` on fields): desc, filter_property/value/field, flatten_property/parent, skip_python, skip_schema.
Includes helper `fields()` to iterate named fields.

title: Task 1.2: Implement attribute parsing with darling

description: Create generators/repr.rs. Parse template strings like 'Trajectory({len(self.steps)} steps, session={self.session_id:12}...)' supporting {self.field}, {self.field:N} (truncation), {len(self.field)}. Generate auto-repr for types without explicit template (first string field preview, 40 char truncation).

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 1.4): implement `__repr__` generation in `crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/repr.rs`.
Supports template interpolation:
- `{self.field}`
- `{self.field:N}` truncation
- `{len(self.field)}`
Fallback auto-repr uses first field or struct name with preview.

title: Task 1.4: Implement __repr__ generation

description: [DSRs: crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/mod.rs + lib.rs] Wire up module exports. Re-export TypedRlm, RlmConfig, RlmResult, RlmError under dspy_rs::rlm::*.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 6.3): wire module exports in `crates/dspy-rs/src/lib.rs` under `#[cfg(feature = "rlm")]`.
Re-export `TypedRlm`, `RlmConfig`, `RlmResult`, `RlmError`, `RlmAdapter` (if separate), and `rlm_core`/`rlm_derive` crates.

title: Task 6.3: Wire up module exports in lib.rs

acceptance_criteria:
1. Cargo.toml has baml-bridge dependency
2. lib.rs re-exports BamlType, TypeIR, Constraint, OutputFormatContent, Flag
3. cargo check passes in dspy-rs
description:
Add baml-bridge path dependency to dspy-rs and set up re-exports for macro-generated code.

**Files to modify:**
- crates/dspy-rs/Cargo.toml - add baml-bridge dependency
- crates/dspy-rs/src/lib.rs - add re-exports

**Search context (use morph):**
- Search 'baml-bridge/crates/bridge' for available public types
- Search 'pub use' in dspy-rs/src/lib.rs for existing re-export pattern
- Search 'BamlValue' and 'TypeIR' in baml-bridge for types to re-export

**Re-exports needed:**
```rust
pub use baml_bridge::BamlType;
pub use baml_bridge::baml_types::{BamlValue, Constraint, ConstraintLevel, ResponseCheck, TypeIR, StreamingMode, TypeValue};
pub use baml_bridge::internal_baml_jinja::types::{OutputFormatContent, RenderOptions};
pub use baml_bridge::jsonish::deserializer::deserialize_flags::Flag;
```

**Dependency path:** `baml-bridge = { path = "../../baml-bridge/crates/bridge", features = ["derive"] }`
title: Phase 0: Add baml-bridge dependency and re-exports
